lines: Mirel touches the empty place at her wrist where the necklace cord used to sit.
"If you find Jarik, tell him I was angry when I gave it away. Then tell him I was more afraid than angry."
Mirel holds out a tin saint on a black cord. The metal has been thumbed smooth around the face.
"My husband Jarik left for Hallowfen to find wall pay. He said fortune likes a man who walks toward it. Fool forgot the only luck he ever trusted."
"If your road reaches that town, give him this. Say Mirel kept it warm and called him a fool every morning."

questUpdate.log: Quest updated: carry Mirel's lucky necklace to Jarik near Hallowfen.
